name: TheChat
description: OpenClaw channel plugin that integrates with TheChat workspaces as a bot account using signed webhooks for inbound messages and the TheChat REST API for outbound replies.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the TheChat API (e.g. https://thechat.example.com).

botUserId.description: User id backing the bot — used for own-message loop prevention.

botName.description: Display name of the bot. Optional; only used in logs.

apiKey.description: Bot API key (Bearer token, prefixed with bot_) used for outbound message sends.

webhookSecret.description: HMAC shared secret used to verify inbound webhook signatures.

maxClockSkewSeconds.description: Maximum allowed difference between webhook timestamp and now (replay protection window).

requireMentionInChannels.description: If true, group-channel messages are only routed to OpenClaw when the bot is @mentioned. DMs always pass through.

allowFrom.description: Allowlist of TheChat user ids allowed to message the bot. Empty array means everyone is allowed.

allowOtherBots.description: If false (default), messages from other bot accounts are dropped to prevent bot-to-bot loops.
